input.tenant_message: Two of the overhead lights in the hallway on the 3rd floor have been out for almost a week now. It's really dark at night and I've almost tripped a couple of times coming home late. I'm also concerned about safety — it feels unsafe walking through a pitch-dark corridor.

ai_output.recommended_action: Replace the burned-out bulbs or faulty fixtures in the 3rd floor hallway within 48 hours. Check whether the issue is limited to bulbs or involves the fixture wiring, and ensure all common-area lighting meets minimum lumen requirements for safety.
